case_title: HILDA & ALICE, INC. VS. KUBER VENTURES LLC DBA MELT GELATO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ROBERT S. BARTLETT RE: INTEREST PURSUANT TO CCP 585 (D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILDA & ALICE, INC.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $297.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT KUBER VENTURES LLC DBA MELT GELATO
NOTICE OF EXHIBITS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILDA & ALICE, INC.

RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUBER VENTURES LLC DBA MELT GELATO $3,667.50 PRINCIPAL, $916.87 ATTORNEY FEES, $117.00 INTEREST, $297.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,998.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
